templates.name: What are Final Sale items?
templates.content: Final Sale items cannot be returned for a refund. These items are indicated as final sale on the product page, shopping cart, and order confirmation with the red "Final  Sale" flag.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/collections/sale-481

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our affiliate program here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/pages/affiliate-program

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/SwimOutlet/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/swimoutlet/

templates.name: How do I use my membership credits?
templates.content: You can apply your credits during checkout, just make sure you're logged into your account. For more info, check out this article we have for that: https://swimoutlet.attn.tv/sl/qlwr9u03

templates.name: Do you offer custom swim caps?
templates.content: Yes, we do offer customization for our swim caps! You can check them out here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/collections/custom-swim-caps-20749

templates.name: Will your caps keep the hair dry?
templates.content:
Swim caps can't be guaranteed to fit watertight or to keep the hair dry due to different head sizes and hair lengths. To best avoid this issue, we recommend pairing it with an ear wrap. 

Let me know if there's anything else I can help with!

templates.name: Having issues with/ unable to checkout
templates.content: If you're having trouble at, or are unable to check out, you can give us a call at 800-691-4065 to complete your order over the phone.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on orders over $49. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Do you ship to Canada?
templates.content: We are still happy to serve our Canadian customers. Simply call us at 1-800-691-4065 to complete your order.

templates.name: How to use store credit
templates.content: Please check out the details about how to use your store credit here: https://swimoutlet.attn.tv/sl/_xmH4LYd Let me know if you have any questions, I'll be happy to help out!

templates.name: I'm looking for a swimsuit for my child's/kid's team
templates.content: We do offer swimsuits through our Sales Team dedicated "Team Stores" where swim teams/clubs can set up storefronts with curated suits and gear! Does your kid's club have a Team Store already? They can actually be found by zip code or name here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/pages/teams

templates.name: Can I add different measurements for prescription googles?
templates.content:
You're welcome to check out our detailed guide on how to choose prescription swimming goggles here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/blogs/guides/how-to-choose-prescription-goggles?utm_campaign=concierge_sitevisitor1&utm_medium=sms&utm_source=attentive&_gl=1*htknom*_ga*MjEzODEzNTI1LjE2NDc3MTExMTI.*_ga_1FK80B1PR1*MTY0Nzg5NTE1NC4zLjEuMTY0Nzg5NTQzNS4zMQ..&externalId=r70CQ If you want to, you can also add measurements for each eye separately.

Also please note that the goggles we sell are pre-made and sold in set diopters. If you need a different diopter for each eye, you can either choose the lower of the two diopters (if they are close) or buy two goggles and combine into one with the diopters you need.

templates.name: Sizing (For swim fins)
templates.content: For swim fins, if you're in between sizes we recommended sizing down for a snug fit, but if that's not an option you can pair your fin with fin socks to get a secure fit. You can also take a look at our more detailed guide on choosing swim fins here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/blogs/guides/how-to-choose-swim-fins?_gl=1%2Arr3pqm%2A_ga%2ANzAyODcwMTU5LjE2NDc5MDEwNDQ.%2A_ga_1FK80B1PR1%2AMTY0Nzk4ODk1Mi4yLjEuMTY0Nzk4OTAyNy41Mg..

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link: https://support.swimoutlet.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=159686 or give us a call at 1-800-691-4065. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Phone Support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-691-4065 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Are memberships only on an annual basis?
templates.content: Our membership is an Automatic Renewal Membership that will renew every year and will be charged automatically to the credit or debit card you provided when you enrolled in the Program or the form of payment we currently have on file for you. The Automatic Renewal Membership will continue until you cancel.

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content:
Orders placed on a weekday by 6:00 pm EST will typically ship on the same day. Orders placed after 6:00 pm EST and on weekends will ship the next business day. We usually ship via USPS or FedEx and once shipped, it will take 2-7 business days domestically.

You can find additional shipping information here: https://support.swimoutlet.com/en_us/categories/shipping-BJfONfGHa

templates.name: I want to order suits for my team
templates.content: Perfect! We offer easy, efficient solutions to outfit your entire team. You can check it out here - https://www.swimoutlet.com/pages/teams?utm_campaign=concierge_sitevisitor_newuser2&utm_medium=sms&utm_source=attentive&externalId=95q7K

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content:
You can check out our detailed return policy here - 
https://support.swimoutlet.com/hc/en-us/articles/202812240-What-is-your-return-policy

templates.name: Sizing (general)
templates.content: Different brands use different sizing charts and even the same brand with different styles. The best way to determine your nearest size is to compare your actual chest, waist, hips and torso measurements in inches to the sizing chart for the item you're interested in. To properly measure yourself, please refer on this link: https://support.swimoutlet.com/hc/en-us/articles/203834114-How-do-I-measure-myself-for-sizing However, sizing charts and our recommendations are merely suggestions and we cannot guarantee a 100% fit due to different body types and shapes.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content:
Eligible items returned in person to a Return Bar will be refunded once accepted at the Return Bar. For returns via mail, in addition to the transit time from your location to our facility, we ask that you please allow 2-6 business days for our staff to check in the return after it has been delivered during peak. 
Regardless of the return method; you will receive an email notification once we have processed your returns and issued the refund or eGift Card requested.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: At this time, we do not have any wholesale programs. However, we offer quantity discounts on many of our products. Please reach out to our Team Division for personalized assistance if you're placing large orders: https://www.swimoutlet.com/pages/teams

templates.name: How to Choose Swim Paddles & Gloves
templates.content: Happy to help! You can check out our detailed guide on choosing swim paddles and gloves here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/blogs/guides/how-to-choose-swim-paddles-gloves?_gl=1%2A58q2bj%2A_ga%2ANzAyODcwMTU5LjE2NDc5MDEwNDQ.%2A_ga_1FK80B1PR1%2AMTY0Nzk5Mzk0OC4zLjEuMTY0Nzk5NDAxOC42MA..

templates.name: Cancel/ Edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link: https://support.swimoutlet.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=159686 or give us a call at 1-800-691-4065. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How can I cancel my membership?
templates.content: You may cancel your Automatic Renewal Membership online at any time from your "My Account" page. If you have any issues doing that on your end, please contact us via this link and our team will be more than happy to help out: https://support.swimoutlet.com/hc/en-us

templates.name: Return policy (tech suits)
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy for tech suits here: https://support.swimoutlet.com/hc/en-us/articles/115002941643-Can-I-return-a-technical-suit

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Where's my referral reward?
templates.content: Within 24 hours of your referred friend placing their first order with us, you'll receive your reward. You'll be notified via email once this reward is issued or you can check your referral dashboard in your account. If your referred friend completed their order more than 24 hours ago and you haven't received your reward, please let me know and I'll be more than happy to look into that for you!

templates.name: Do you ship to APO/FPO addresses?
templates.content: We're proud to supply members of our Armed Forces around the globe. Due to processing requirements, APO/FPO shipments are typically handed over to USPS within 3-4 business days of placing your order. During peak seasons and holidays, it may take longer. Please allow up to 8 weeks for delivery after you place your order.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a referral program where you can give your friends 20% off their first order, and you'll get $20 when they make a purchase. Check it out here - https://www.swimoutlet.com/pages/share

templates.name: Can I resend a referral offer?
templates.content: Yes! If you need to resend an expired or deleted referral offer, go to your Refer a Friend Dashboard under My Account and find the referral offer you need to resend. Simply click the "Resend" button to email your friend their referral offer.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: We ship to most countries worldwide. International packages are shipped via Passport Shipping. For orders to the UK & EU, Passport will be the Seller of Record for orders under £135 and orders to the EU for orders €150 and under. All international packages arrive Delivered Duty Paid (DDP) and transit times are typically 8-14 business days. You can learn more about international shipping here: https://support.swimoutlet.com/hc/en-us/articles/202964500

templates.name: Is there a limit to how many referrals I send?
templates.content: You can issue a maximum of 100 Friend Incentives.

templates.name: What is a Return Bar?
templates.content: We've partnered with Happy Returns to offer printer-free, packaging-free, and sustainable returns. Simply start your return online to receive a QR code, locate a Return Bar near you, bring in your items, and you're good to go!

templates.name: Can I purchase/obtain replacement parts from you?
templates.content: Please check the brand or product page to determine if we carry the replacement parts you need. If the parts cannot be located on our site, we recommend following any instructions regarding warranty/repair/replacement parts in the product manual or contact the manufacturer directly.

templates.name: Does my referral offer expire?
templates.content: Yes, your friend has 90 days to claim the referral offer. If the offer is not claimed in 90 days, you can resend the offer from your Refer a Friend Dashboard under My Account.

templates.name: Does my product have a warranty?
templates.content: If you require a copy of the manufacturer's warranty, please contact the manufacturer or visit their website for more information. Please note, manufacturer warranties may not apply in all cases depending on factors including use of the product or when the product was purchased. Please review the warranty carefully and contact the manufacturer directly for any additional questions.

templates.name: How can I obtain a copy of my receipt/invoice?
templates.content: If you're logged into your account, click the "Account" link at the top right-hand side of our site and choose "My Orders" to view past orders. Click "Order Details" to see the complete order information including the order total, payment method, ship status and complete list of items on the order.

templates.name: How much is shipping to Hawaii, Alaska, or US Territories?
templates.content: At this time we offer a $12.99 flat rate shipping to Hawaii, Alaska, and US Territories. Please note that orders shipping to Hawaii, Alaska, and US Territories are ineligible for free or expedited shipping.

templates.name: What is your Price Match Guarantee?
templates.content:
We're dedicated to always offering the best value to our customers! We'll match any published price (i.e., the price currently listed on an authorized US retailer's website) for an identical in-stock item (same brand, size, color, and year) in new condition within 24 hours of purchase. 

Please note, price matching is not available for special offers, coupon codes, select specialty items, customization, finale sale, clearance and/or items which ship directly from the manufacturer. Third party sellers on Amazon will be matched, and any shipping fees will be added to the total match amount.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://support.swimoutlet.com/en_us/how-do-i-measure-myself-for-sizing-rkER4zfST

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.swimoutlet.com/collections/sale-481
